title: Tower PT10053WHT Presto 1.7L Electric Kettle, Removable Limescale Filter, Boil Dry Protection, 2200W, White
features: RAPID BOIL: This 2200W Tower Presto kettle boils quicker than a lower wattage kettle, meaning less waiting time
BOIL 8 CUPS AT ONCE: 1.8 litre capacity is large enough to boil up to 8 cups of tea or coffee at a time so 8 people can be served piping hot drinks at once
EASY GRIP HANDLE: Equipped with a large handle that's easy to grip and kettle slots seamlessly into round base, suitable for left and right handed users
BUILT TO LAST: Flip top lid for cleaning with removable, easy-to-clean filter designed to beat limescale build up for a longer product lifetime
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 1-year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products This Presto kettle is great little addition to the kitchen This electric kettle has a 1.7 litre capacity that can make up to 7 cups from a single boil, so you can enjoy a nice brew with friends and family. The included filter can be detached which is easy to clean and maintain, ensuring the kettle continues to perform at its best. Also included is boil dry protection and automatic switch off, which provide added safety when in use. Powerful 2200W so you can enjoy your beverages faster 1.7L capacity makes up to 7 cups from one fill Water gauge for an efficient boil Detachable limescale filter for easy cleaning and maintenance Separate base with cord for portability 1.7L CAPACITY 1.7l capacity makes up to 7 cups from a single boil, so you can enjoy a fresh brew with friends and family 2200W QUICK BOIL Powerful 2200W heating element so you can enjoy your beverages faster HINGED LID WITH SEPARATE BASE Easy manual opening hinged lid with separate base with cord for portability
